kirundi.geometry_world_3d_block_based_math_exp: Geometry World — umushakashatsi w'imibare 3D ushingiye ku tubari. Koresha WASD kugira ngo unyure, imbeba kugira ngo urebe, kanda ibumoso kugira ngo umene utubari, kanda iburyo kugira ngo ushyire utubari.
kirundi.print_a_card_to_build_this_structure_w: Sohora ikarita kugira ngo wubake iyi nyubako ukoresheje ibikoresho bifatika
kirundi.student_home_language_for_bilingual_np: Ururimi rw'umunyeshuri rwo mu rugo ku magambo y'indimi ebyiri za NPC
kirundi.student_home_language_npcs_will_speak_: Ururimi rw'umunyeshuri rwo mu rugo — NPC bazavuga indimi ebyiri
kirundi.export_structures_as_stl_file_for_3d_p: Sohora inyubako nk'idosiye STL ku icapiro rya 3D
kirundi.capture_a_screenshot_of_your_world_sav: Fata ifoto y'ekran y'isi yawe (ibikwa muri za download)
kirundi.print_companion_worksheet_for_this_les: Sohora urupapuro rw'imyitozo rufasha kuri iri somo
kirundi.import_a_world_from_json_file: Injiza isi uvanye mu idosiye JSON
kirundi.export_session_analytics_as_csv_for_re: Sohora isesengura ry'igihe nka CSV ku bushakashatsi
kirundi.export_mtss_progress_monitoring_report: Sohora raporo yo gukurikirana iterambere ya MTSS (icyiciro cy'urwego RTI, amakuru y'igihe kirekire)
kirundi.share_this_world_to_the_class_library: Sangiza iyi si mu isomero ry'ishuri
kirundi.browse_worlds_shared_by_classmates: Reba isi zasangiwe na bagenzi b'ishuri
kirundi.describe_a_geometry_lesson_topic_for_a: Sobanura ingingo y'isomo rya geometiri ku ikorwa rya AI
kirundi.generation_depth_number_of_ai_passes: Ubujyakuzimu bw'ikorwa: umubare w'inzira za AI
kirundi.browse_saved_ai_generated_lessons: Reba amasomo yabitswe yakozwe na AI
kirundi.refine_make_it_harder_add_more_npcs_ch: Noza: "Rigore" / "Ongeraho NPC nyinshi" / "Hindura ingingo ube inyanja"...
kirundi.npc_compass_strip_showing_relative_dir: Umurongo wa kompas wa NPC werekana icyerekezo gifitanye isano kuri buri NPC uhereye ku cyerekezo cya kamera
kirundi.close_all_open_overlays_and_return_to_: Funga ibipfukisho byose byafunguwe usubire ku ireba ry'umukino
kirundi.close_all_overlays_return_to_the_3d_ga: Funga ibipfukisho byose usubire ku mukino wa 3D (cyangwa ukande Shift+Esc)
kirundi.what_should_the_npc_say_e_g_look_at_th: NPC akwiye kuvuga iki? (urugero "Reba inyubako iri inyuma yanjye!")
kirundi.answer_choices_separated_by_pipe_chara: Amahitamo y'ibisubizo, atandukanyijwe n'inyuguti y'umurongo uhagaze
kirundi.toggle_coordinate_screen_reader_announ: Hindura amatangazo y'imisozi y'umusomyi w'ekran (urufunguzo C)
kirundi.toggle_fly_mode_or_double_tap_space: Hindura uburyo bwo guguruka (cyangwa ukande Space inshuro ebyiri)
kirundi.clear_only_your_placed_blocks_lesson_s: Siba gusa utubari WEWE washyizeho (inyubako z'isomo zigumaho). Ningombwa mu gutangira ubushakashatsi bushya.
kirundi.what_was_the_most_interesting_thing_yo: Ni iki gishishikaje cyane wavumbuye? Ni ubuhe buryo bwagufashije gukemura ibibazo?
kirundi.click_to_hear_translation_spoken_aloud: Kanda kugira ngo wumve ubusobanuro busomwa mu ijwi rirenga
kirundi.translate_this_dialogue_with_ai_uses_a: Sobanura iki kiganiro na AI (ikoresha icyifuzo kimwe cya AI)
kirundi.hmm_i_m_having_trouble_thinking_right_: Hmm, biragoye kuri njye gutekereza ubu. Gerageza kubaza mu bundi buryo!
kirundi.toggle_fullscreen_for_the_3d_world: Hindura ekran yuzuye ku isi ya 3D
